name: FiEE, Inc.
summary: PART I Overview FiEE, Inc. (formerly, Minim, Inc.) was founded in 1977 as a networking company and historically delivered a comprehensive WiFi/Software as a Service (SaaS) platform to make connected homes safe and supportive for life and work. During this period, we held the exclusive global license to design, manufacture, and sell consumer networking products under the Motorola brand until 2023. Our legacy cable and WiFi products, including cable modems, routers, and mesh networking devices, we...
